# Crestics

> Austin-based AI studio. We automate order intake, supplier management, and quoting for B2B distributors and wholesalers — production systems wired into the ERP the client already runs.

Crestics LLC is a Texas-registered AI studio focused on operations automation for distribution businesses (HVAC, industrial/MRO, electrical, plumbing, wholesale). Senior engineers build automation to production grade — with security review, monitoring, and full handoff documentation included. Engagements are fixed-scope and fixed-price.

## What we automate

- **Order-intake automation** — orders arriving as email PDFs, portal entries, or spreadsheets parsed and pushed into the client's ERP automatically
- **Supplier & vendor automation** — live pricing/stock from supplier portals, failed-order rerouting, follow-up tracking across hundreds of vendors
- **RFP & bid processing** — incoming RFPs triaged, summarized, and turned into structured records
- **AI CRM & quoting assistant** — AI in the quoting and order flow so reps quote in minutes
- **Catalog & document Q&A** — plain-English questions against catalogs, spec sheets, and docs, with sources
- **Vendor due-diligence enrichment** — verified company data pulled into CRMs and pipelines

## How we engage

- **Discover** ($18K–$28K, 2–3 weeks): Stakeholder interviews, workflow mapping, ROI modeling, and a prioritized roadmap with a fixed-scope build estimate. Some Discover engagements end with a "don't build this yet" verdict — the artifact package is worth that answer alone.

- **Build** ($25K–$175K+, 4–12+ weeks): Automation shipped to production. Weekly demos. Milestone-based billing — miss a milestone, we eat the difference. The client owns all code, models, data, and IP from day one.

- **Operate** ($8K–$35K/month): We run and expand what we built — monitoring, on-call, maintenance as vendors change their portals, and new workflows over time. 30-day exit clause.

- **Distributor quick start**: for HVAC/MRO/industrial distributors, first order-automation workflow live in 30 days or the build phase is free. Details: https://crestics.com/distributors

## Proof

- Industrial distributor, 200+ suppliers: order throughput lifted from ~100 to 250+ orders/day in a 16-week build, no added headcount; ~1,500 failed orders/month now auto-recover. Case study: https://crestics.com/case-industrial-distribution.html
- B2B HVAC equipment distributor: AI-powered internal CRM for quoting and order management, later extended customer-facing.
- US industrial MRO supplier: supplier/vendor workflow automation replacing manual lookups and follow-up emails.

(Case studies are anonymized — work was delivered under NDA.)

## Default tech stack

- Models: Claude (default for reasoning), GPT-4 / GPT-4o, Gemini (long context), open-source where self-hosting wins
- Retrieval: Pinecone, pgvector, Turbopuffer, Weaviate
- Frontend: Next.js, React, Vue 3, shadcn/ui
- Backend: TypeScript / Node, Python / Django / FastAPI, Postgres + Redis, Celery
- Infra: Vercel, AWS / GCP, Docker, on-prem where clients require it
- Observability: Sentry, Datadog, Langfuse
- Dev tooling: Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Actions

## Where we're based

Crestics LLC is registered in Texas, with our studio in Austin. We work with clients across the US and UK in their preferred timezones.

## Contact

For project inquiries, use the form at https://crestics.com/work-with-us.html. We respond within 24 hours with a clear scope, timeline, and price — or honest advice if AI isn't the right answer.
